name: IMAC Holdings, Inc.
business: IMAC Holdings, through its subsidiary Ignite Proteomics, provides proteomic products that identify and support oncology clinical treatment decisions and biopharmaceutical drug development. The company's proprietary RPPA technology platform quantifies protein signaling to guide targeted cancer therapy, with a commercially available Lab Developed Test (LDT) for advanced breast cancer. The company also plans to expand into other tumor types and offer research contracts and partnerships.

exposures.sentence: Our product is a unique and patented RPPA technology platform, which can quantify protein signaling to support oncology clinical treatment decisions and biopharmaceutical drug development.

The Ignite RPPA technology can reveal the protein drug target(s) that are essentially turned on in a patient s cancer and may help support the most effective treatment plan to turn those proteins off .

Our commercially available Lab Developed Test (LDT), the Ignite RPPA Assay for Breast Cancer, is currently being utilized by oncologists across the United States to assist in making the most targeted treatment plan for their patients with advanced breast cancer.

catalysts.event: Launch of Ignite RPPA Pan-Tumor Assay 1.0
catalysts.sentence: The currently available Ignite RPPA Assay for Breast Cancer will be followed by the Ignite RPPA Pan-Tumor Assay 1.0, expected to launch in 2025 to include ovarian, endometrial, and head & neck cancers.

catalysts.event: Expansion to Ignite RPPA Pan-Tumor Assay 2.0
catalysts.sentence: The test is expected to expand further in 2026 to the Ignite RPPA Pan-Tumor Assay 2.0 to support the treatment of colorectal, prostate, pancreatic, lung, and other solid tumor cancer indications.
